languages.text: {n}Лария слушает ваш рассказ с почти болезненной сосредоточенностью. Чем яснее становится картина, тем мрачнее — выражение ее лица.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Лария слушает ваш рассказ с почти болезненной сосредоточенностью. Чем яснее становится картина, тем мрачнее — выражение ее лица.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Лария слушает ваш рассказ с почти болезненной сосредоточенностью. Чем яснее становится картина, тем мрачнее — выражение ее лица.{/n}

{n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅以一种近乎痛苦的专注听着你的讲述。随着事态逐渐清晰，她的脸色愈发阴沉。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅以一种近乎痛苦的专注听着你的讲述。随着事态逐渐清晰，她的脸色愈发阴沉。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria écoute votre histoire avec une concentration peinée. À mesure que le tableau se dessine plus précisément, son expression s'assombrit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria écoute votre histoire avec une concentration peinée. À mesure que le tableau se dessine plus précisément, son expression s'assombrit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria, hikâyeni âdeta ızdırap dolu bir odakla dinliyor. Büyük resim berraklık kazandıkça yüzündeki ifade daha da kararıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, hikâyeni âdeta ızdırap dolu bir odakla dinliyor. Büyük resim berraklık kazandıkça yüzündeki ifade daha da kararıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria escucha tu historia con una concentración casi dolorida. A medida que la conclusión se vuelve más evidente, su expresión se ensombrece.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria escucha tu historia con una concentración casi dolorida. A medida que la conclusión se vuelve más evidente, su expresión se ensombrece.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Laria hört sich deine Geschichte mit fast schmerzhafter Konzentration an. Als das Bild klarer wird, verdunkelt sich ihr Gesichtsausdruck.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ラリアはあなたの話を苦痛に似た集中力で聞いています。話の内容が鮮明になるにつれて、彼女の表情は暗くなります。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Laria listens to your story with an almost pained concentration. As the picture becomes clearer, her expression grows darker.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ラリアはあなたの話を苦痛に似た集中力で聞いています。話の内容が鮮明になるにつれて、彼女の表情は暗くなります。{/n}
